I was really looking forward to trying the new wireless earbuds from X500, but unfortunately, they've been a huge disappointment. The sound quality is subpar, with a lot of static and distortion, especially when listening to music with deep bass. The battery life is also not as long as advertised, I get around 4 hours of playback time instead of the promised 8 hours. The design is sleek, but the earbuds are not comfortable to wear for extended periods and often slip out of my ears. For the price, I expected a lot more quality and performance. Sadly, I would not recommend these earbuds to anyone.
